title: UwU Tools Diamond
description: Do you ever wanted to have pink diamond tools? Here they are now!!!
body:
# UwU Tools by Shadow_Dara

Transform your Minecraft experience with the adorable Pink Uwu Tools Texture Pack! This pack reimagines your Diamond tools with a cute and vibrant pink aesthetic, perfect for adding a touch of charm to your gameplay. Dive into the world of Pink with these texture Pack

## Important
**If you try to add the _Resourcepack_ in a newer/older version, you may see a message like this:**
```
This Resourcepack was made for a newer/older Version of Minecraft
```
**Just ignore that message, it will still work!!!**
